---
title: "About"
image: rttmg-purple.png
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/LucyMcGowan/regressiontothemeangirls
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://instagram.com/regressiontothemeangirls
---

This is Regression to the Mean Girls where we chat with brilliant data people about their silliest side quests. We're mean, as in average, but actually very nice! Come sit with us!
